name: Xperi Inc.
business: Xperi Inc. is a media and entertainment technology company whose technologies are integrated into consumer devices, connected cars, and media platforms. The company generates revenue from four categories: Pay-TV, Consumer Electronics, Connected Car, and Media Platform. It has approximately 1,460 employees and over 35 years of operating experience.

exposures.sentence: Our DTS codec is designed to enable recording, delivery and playback of immersive high-definition audio and is incorporated by customers around the world into an array of consumer electronics devices.
We seek to transform the automotive experience with a content-oriented multimedia experience, driven by personalization to the connected car.

Media Platform provides the technology required to enable consumers to find, watch, and enjoy their favorite media entertainment on connected devices, while at the same time, providing us the opportunity to monetize this consumer engagement.

Within Pay-TV, we deliver a range of User Experience (UX) solutions servicing Pay-TV operators on a worldwide basis with products that address the evolving user experience around TV content consumption.

We continue to develop and evolve our DTS audio technologies, leveraging our content insight and artificial intelligence (AI) capabilities, to deliver immersive audio with enhanced device playback solutions that solve end user issues such as loudness and dialogue clarity.
cybersecurity and stability risks, information technology system failures, and security breaches;

catalysts.event: Mercedes Benz launch of DTS AutoStage Video Service Powered by TiVo in new vehicles
catalysts.sentence: and Mercedes Benz launched for new vehicles in January 2026.
We expect to substantially complete the restructuring activities by the end of the first half of 2026.

catalysts.event: TiVo One monthly active users milestone exceeded 5 million
catalysts.sentence: By December 31, 2025, we reached a significant milestone of over five million TiVo One monthly active users, reflecting growth of more than 250% from December 31, 2024.

tamClaims.claim: Revenue from shipment of platforms and devices in North America to surpass $268 billion in 2025 and grow 1.5% YoY to 2028
tamClaims.sentence: TechInsights estimates revenue from the shipment of these platforms and devices in North America alone (including TVs, Smartphones, Tablets and PCs, Streaming Media Players, connected Blu-Rays players, and Video Game consoles) to surpass $268 billion in 2025 and continue to grow by 1.5% year-over-year to 2028.
